projects.name: Solar + Energy Storage on Garage
projects.description: Install 5-7 solar panels on south-facing garage roof face (20x12 ft, ~2-2.8 kW) plus battery storage. Solar = standalone ROI investment (~5yr payback at $0.42/kWh). Battery = generator alternative (no lot space for generator). 30% federal ITC applies to both when paired.
projects.notes: DESIGN: South garage face only. 5 portrait panels = 2.0 kW; 7 mixed = 2.8 kW. ~3,200-4,500 kWh/yr production (20-26% offset). All-in after ITC: solar ~$9-10k, battery ~$9-10k. VENDORS: Sunergy (sunergy.com) — EnergySage 2026 CA Installer of Year, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door. NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com) — Diamond Certified, 35yr, San Mateo County, 40yr warranty. Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy) — online only. AVOID: Sunrun.

tasks.title: Analyze energy usage and size system
tasks.notes: 17,178 kWh/yr at $0.42/kWh avg. Target: 5-7 panels south garage face (20x12 ft) = 2-2.8 kW. ~5yr payback after ITC.

tasks.title: Research and shortlist solar installers
tasks.notes: Shortlist: Sunergy (sunergy.com, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door), NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com, Diamond Certified, San Mateo County), Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy, online only). Avoid Sunrun.

tasks.title: Contact installers for quotes
tasks.notes: Spec: south garage face (20x12 ft, 5-7 panels, ~2-2.8 kW), paired battery (Enphase IQ or Powerwall 3), detached garage sub-panel interconnect. Ask each for: $/W, panel brand, inverter type, battery spec, warranty, timeline, ITC total. Request free shade/LIDAR analysis.

tasks.title: Compare quotes and select installer
tasks.notes: Prefer Enphase microinverters over string inverter. Compare $/W, battery spec, warranty, timeline. 30% ITC on full system incl. battery.

tasks.title: Confirm ITC timing — credit files in year PTO is granted
tasks.notes: 30% federal ITC on Form 5695. Claimed in tax year Permission to Operate granted by PG&E. Battery qualifies only when solar-paired. Plan install timing accordingly.

needs_attention.title: Contact installers for quotes

maintenance.name: Air Filter — Downstairs HVAC
maintenance.notes: Filter size: 13.5 × 29.5 × 1 inch (Merv 11 or 13 recommended). Two HVAC systems — this is downstairs unit.

maintenance.name: Air Filter — Upstairs HVAC
maintenance.notes: Filter size: 16 × 24 × 1 inch. Upstairs HVAC unit.

maintenance.name: LG Washer/Dryer
maintenance.notes: LG washer/dryer combo. Installed 2019. Expected lifespan ~10-13 yrs. Annual cleaning/maintenance check.

maintenance.name: Thermador Refrigerator
maintenance.notes: Thermador refrigerator. New 2025. Check condenser coils annually. Warranty: typically 2yr full, 5yr sealed system.

maintenance.name: Wolf Range
maintenance.notes: Wolf range. New 2025. Annual burner and igniter check. Wolf warranty: 2yr parts & labor.

maintenance.name: Thermador Dishwasher
maintenance.notes: Thermador dishwasher. New 2025. Clean filter every 6 months. Warranty: typically 2yr.

insights.summary: [dog_run] The dog_run camera is experiencing technical failure, displaying error messages.
[front_yard] An unknown dark green pickup is parked in the driveway.

There is a critical, unobserved event at 18:39 when the doorbell detected glass breaking or shattering at the front door. This high-severity incident was immediately followed by a period of silence and only routine audio detections, suggesting the event was brief, contained, or that the occupants were immediately occupied/disoriented, which is worth noting for security review.
[living_room] Urgent dog barking in the backyard
[dog_run] The dog_run camera is currently non-functional and displaying a system error.
[dog_run] The dog_run camera is not providing valid frames and is displaying a 'no frames received' error.

Although the initial high-alert incident (calling/yelling) has passed, the persistent detection of unclassified audio across multiple outdoor zones (backyard, dog_run, front_yard) between 17:39 and 17:41 suggests that the environment is not fully settled. This lingering audio activity, coupled with the doorbell ringing at 17:42, indicates that there may be a low-level, ongoing presence or disturbance that warrants monitoring.
Unusually high activity at living_room this hour: 6 observations vs typical 1 for weekend 17:00
[living_room] Unclassified audio in the front yard persists following a recent alert of someone calling for help.
[dog_run] The dog_run camera is down and not providing any visual monitoring of the side yard.
